description: Legal notes. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe? Three distinct entries, probably. (1) Mentions accounting of various sums; someone collected 2; 1 remains; someone must pay 1 monthly. Mention Shela. Mentions "9 qirats for each of them." (2) Involves two people's daughter and mother; and an obligation to pay for their sustenance (awadihimā); and their death. (3) Has to do with property, describing its boundaries. Mentions [...] al-Ḥakīm al-Qazzāz Natan, and a new house [known by the name of?] Abū Naṣr b. Shalom. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
